content.en:
Yanglong Tianjun also knew that Ye Tian's identity was not ordinary, but it was a personal inheritance of the Dao ancestor, and he must not be offended.

But the meaning of the Zhiyang Xingchen Flower to him is really extraordinary, one of his secret techniques is needed to the Zhiyang Xingchen Flower, once he gets the Zhiyang Xingchen Flower, his strength will be greatly improved, and even directly enter the top 100 of the Heavenly Monarch List, and in the future, he is even expected to achieve the top 30 of the Heavenly Monarch List and become a real invincible Heavenly Monarch.

At that time, his status will be extraordinary.

Besides, as long as he didn't kill Ye Tian, then even if he didn't offend him much, it would be impossible for the Void Heaven to make a big move because he snatched Ye Tian's Solstice Star Flower!

As for offending Ye Tian, that's nothing.

It's a big deal that he leaves the big universe in the future, can Ye Tian still chase him out and kill him?

Therefore, he would rather risk offending Ye Tian completely than take away the Zhiyang Xingchen Flower.

"You're bold!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Wanfa Daozi, hand over the Zhiyang Xingchen Flower, otherwise I'm welcome!"

Yang Long Tianjun said coldly.

"You don't know me so well!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Yang Long Tianjun no longer hesitated, and made a move in an instant.

One after another, the fire dragons carried extremely terrifying flames and killed Ye Tian, as if hundreds of millions of giant dragons had taken off into the air, this kind of means was too terrifying, far beyond ordinary heavenly monarchs.

In the face of such an attack, the other Heavenly Monarchs would try to avoid it, but Ye Tian stood there without moving, just casting the Blood River Immortal Technique.

A river of blood appeared, suppressing the infinite flames on the solar planet.

When the flames met the rivers of blood, none of them could get close.

And Yang Dragon Tianjun's hundreds of millions of fire dragons bombarded Ye Tian's body, collapsing one by one, and they couldn't hurt Ye Tian at all.

"It's too weak and too weak, you can't even break my defenses, and even if you break my defenses, you won't be able to destroy me in the Blood River Immortal Technique!" Ye Tian's voice spread throughout this void.

"Blood River Immortal Technique, you actually practiced such a chaotic supernatural power!!

Yang Long Tianjun was shocked.

Moreover, he could see that Ye Tian's body not only had the Blood River Immortal Technique, but also the Extreme Level Great Immortal Technique, and his body was also almost immortal.

Many factors created Ye Tian's immortal body, which was not something that the Heavenly Monarch level could kill.

"Miscalculated!"

Yang Long Tianjun smiled bitterly.

I knew that Ye Tian was so terrifying, how could he dare to do it!

Now not only can't even get the Zhiyang Xingchen Flower, but even offended Ye Tian, and it will be completely finished in the future.

"Run!"

Yang Long Tianjun tried to leave.

However, Ye Tian would not let him go.

Burst!

Yang Long Tianjun's body froze, a knife mark appeared on his body, and his entire body was almost cut off, and one percent of his vitality was annihilated.

"How can this be !!?"

Yang Dragon Heavenly Monarch knows how powerful his body is, he is walking the Zhiyang Dao, and what is condensed is the Zhiyang Dao Body, although it is only the peak of the Zhiyang Dao Body, and has not yet reached the Dacheng realm, but the body is far stronger than other Heavenly Monarchs, and the vitality is extremely rich, and the Zhiyang aura can even shock some weaker Yin Evil Heavenly Monarchs.

With such a powerful body, it would be difficult to kill him.

But now, Ye Tian's knife annihilated one percent of his body.

Doesn't this mean that Ye Tian can kill him with a hundred knives?

A hundred swords may seem like a lot, but the Heavenly Monarch can slash out 100 swords in an instant!

Of course.

The Heavenly Monarch can slash 100 swords, or even 1,000 swords, 10,000 swords in an instant, but it is impossible to say how many swords he can hit.

But Yang Long Tianjun was very frightened, because he couldn't sense Ye Tiandao's trajectory.

Ye Tian's speed of the knife was too fast, so fast that it was beyond his perception.

Puff puff puff!!!!

A knife bombarded Yang Long Tianjun's body, no matter how he escaped, how he changed his route, and even shuttled through the space, he couldn't stop Ye Tian's attack.

Ye Tian's space-time transfer technique was too powerful, and it was simply an invincible magic power in close combat.

When his body was annihilated by fifty percent, Yang Long Tianjun begged for mercy.

"Ten thousand ways to spare your life!"

Yanglong Tianjun cried and knelt down to beg for mercy.

Wow!

Ye Tian appeared in front of Yanglong Tianjun and said coldly: "Didn't you threaten me just now, and you dared to attack me, how can you beg for mercy now?"

"Wanfa Daozi, I just need the Zhiyang Xingchen Flower too much, so my brain is confused. And I just want to snatch the Zhiyang Xingchen Flower, I never thought of killing you Wanfa Daozi, and I also asked Wanfa Daozi to give you a chance!" Yang Long Tianjun begged for mercy.

"Hmph, if you show your killing intent, you will be dead a long time ago!" Ye Tian said: "Okay, I'll give you a chance, make a natal oath, recognize me as the master, I can not kill you!"

Ye Tian's desire to take over Yang Long Tianjun was not a momentary idea, but a long time ago, he wanted to find a subordinate who ran errands.

The Terrans could help him, but only a small favor.

Moreover, the human race is too weak, and they can't help him in many things at the moment, and some Heavenly Monarchs of the Void Heaven Temple are impossible to be his subordinates, even if some Heavenly Monarchs are willing to take refuge in him, but when they encounter some big opportunities, they are definitely unwilling to tell him.

Because he had to find a 100% loyal man.

But creatures have a mind, and if they want to have a 100% loyal subordinate, they can only control the life and death of the other party.

Ye Tian didn't dare to control the Heavenly Monarch of the Void Heaven Palace, that was death, and Dao Ancestor would not spare him if he knew it.

In addition, Ye Tian didn't dare to control the Heavenly Monarchs of other Dao Ancestor forces, this was one of the taboos!

Otherwise, if the Heavenly Monarch who controls the other Dao Ancestor's forces enters the interior, wouldn't it be able to spy on some secrets and even inheritances?

If this thing is discovered, it is tantamount to dying!

Moreover, the Heavenly Monarch who controls the Dao Ancestor forces, this matter cannot be hidden from the other party's Dao Ancestor, so Ye Tian can only control some Heavenly Monarchs of ordinary big forces.

For example, Yangtian Temple.

The Yang Tian Temple is a force established by a true ancestor, that true ancestor is not too powerful, and the great universe is blocked, even if he controls the Heavenly Monarch of the Yang Tian Temple, that true ancestor can't be calculated.

It's a big deal to let Yanglong Tianjun leave Yangtian Hall in the future, so it won't be considered a violation of the rules.

Once there is a Heavenly Monarch's subordinates, many things can be done as long as they are ordered, and Ye Tian does not need to waste time to do them.

But the Heavenly Monarch who is too weak does not have enough potential and is not qualified to be his subordinate, the Yang Dragon Heavenly Monarch is good, and is even expected to become the top 100 Heavenly Monarch on the Heavenly Monarch List, and he is also the helmsman of the Yang Heavenly Temple in the Great Universe, which is equivalent to controlling a big force to serve himself.

Therefore, Yang Long Tianjun is the most suitable subordinate.

"What, you want me to be your slave!!!"

Yang Long Tianjun was furious.

Make an oath, this is equivalent to being controlled by Ye Tian for the rest of your life, and there will never be a chance to turn over!

How would he be willing?

"If you don't want to, then die!" Ye Tian threatened: "And why do you think anyone is qualified to take refuge in me? I will become a true ancestor in the future, and even become a Dao ancestor is very promising, if you follow me, you may have the hope of becoming a top true ancestor in the future, besides, with me as a backer, who dares to bully you? Life or death, you can choose for yourself!"

Yanglong Tianjun's face changed many times.

He's scared to death!

True, he would love to live, but not to be controlled.

Time passed little by little, and Ye Tian's patience gradually ran out.

Just when Ye Tian was about to kill Yang Long Tianjun, Yang Long Tianjun finally made up his mind.

"I'm willing to surrender!"

Yanglong Tianjun lowered his head and said.

He figured it out, if he didn't agree, he would definitely die!

If he agreed, although he was controlled by Ye Tian, Ye Tian was right about one thing, that is, Ye Tian's potential was too high, and he was the person with the highest potential he had ever seen.

Ye Tian will inevitably be able to become a true ancestor in the future, and he is the top true ancestor, even if he can't step into the Dao Ancestor, he can still fight with ordinary true ancestors.

Surrendering to such a Tianjiao, he is not a loss.

"Make a vow and give me a wisp of natal soul by the way!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes!"

Yanglong Tianjun nodded, and immediately began to make an oath, and handed over a wisp of natal soul to Ye Tian, truly controlled by Ye Tian, there was no hope of breaking free.

"Here you go!"

Ye Tian handed the Extreme Yang Xingchen Flower to Yang Dragon Heavenly Monarch.

"This ......" Yang Long Tianjun was extremely surprised, this is the Yang Xingchen Flower, how valuable it is, even if it is not of much help to Ye Tian, it can be traded!

"You are my subordinate, I will naturally cultivate you, and you seem to need the Zhiyang Xingchen Flower very much, then give you a boost in strength, otherwise if your strength is too weak, it will not be convenient to do things for me!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Thank you, master!"

Yanglong Tianjun said.

"Yang Long, how long have you been in Tai'a Sun Star?" Ye Tian asked.

"It's been more than two months!" replied Yang Long Tianjun.

"It's been more than two months, it's not too short!" Ye Tianxuan immediately asked again: "I heard that Tai'a Sun Star is suspected of having Eternal Flame, I don't know if you have heard of it?"

"I've heard of it!" Yang Dragon Heavenly Monarch hurriedly replied, "The Eternal Flame is a top-level innate origin thing, and its value is much greater than that of the Extreme Yang Star Flower. Not long ago, a wisp of eternal flame appeared on Tai'a Sun Star, but it quickly disappeared. Top Innate Origin Objects all possess a certain amount of wisdom and can move and shuttle, so it is not easy to catch it. If the rumors are correct, then there must be an eternal flame on the Tai'a Sun Star!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian was excited.

Tai'a Sun Star has eternal flame, and that's a great thing.

Even if he couldn't capture it, he would be able to trade it once someone captured it.

Of course, the safest way is to seize it yourself, otherwise once someone else seizes it and is unwilling to trade, he has no choice.

"Yang Long, you are looking for the Eternal Flame on the Tai'a Sun Star for me, and by the way, you will mobilize the power of the Yang Heaven Temple to find it. Remember, don't expose our relationship for the time being, and try not to let the people of the Chaos Yang Heavenly Temple find out! When you leave the Yang Heavenly Temple after something that cannot be concealed in the future, at that time, even I should be qualified to keep you, and the Yang Heavenly Temple will have nothing to do!"

"Yes!"

Yang Long Tianjun nodded.

Immediately, he left, looking for the Eternal Flame for Ye Tian, and ordered the other Heavenly Monarchs of the Tai'a Sun Xingyang Heavenly Temple to also look for the Eternal Flame.
